chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4785 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19956/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2025 Mr. Jam Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the respondent. Per learned counsel the impugned notice has been withdrawn, therefore, petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
